  "findings": [
    "Submittal package is incomplete — missing product listing page and project note required to verify conductor type and ampacity rating",
    "Proposed shortcut for conductor selection and sizing cannot be validated against approved submittal documentation",
    "NEC 310 and Table 310.16 ampacity values depend on conductor insulation type, temperature rating, and installation conditions that are not yet confirmed"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the conductor installation shortcut pending submittal verification",
    "Request the missing product listing page and applicable project note from the submittal package",
    "Verify conductor insulation type, temperature rating, and installation method against approved submittal before proceeding",
    "Confirm ampacity from Table 310.16 matches the selected conductor under actual installed conditions including any derating factors"
  ],
  "rationale": "The crew's proposed shortcut cannot be approved without the submittal documentation that establishes whether the conductor type and sizing method are permitted for this installation. NEC 310 and Table 310.16 require specific conductor parameters to determine compliant ampacity, and the missing listing page and project note are the controlling documents. Proceeding without verification risks non-compliant sizing that could create an unsafe condition.",

    "NEC 310",
    "Table 310.16"
  ]
}
